entries.back_en: We forgot to mention, but the line between dream
and reality can blur. Please, be careful.
entries.note: 'tome cuidado' = be careful; equivalent to 'use caution'

entries.back_en: If you believe you died within your dream.
You'll kick the bucket in reality too.
entries.note: 'bater as botas' good idiomatic match for 'kick the bucket'

entries.back_en: M-Master Haku, did we triumph this day?
Victory is ours! Oh, victory is OURS, Master Haku!
entries.note: 'A vitória é nossa' for 'The day is ours' - acceptable equivalent

entries.back_en: M-Master Haku, did we triumph this day? N-Our lives
Victory is ours! Oh, victory is OURS, Master Haku!
